commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces OpenClaw-local image resize/encode/probe code with Rastermill `encodeBest`, removes the Photon-local implementation and fallback tests, and updates package locks to a Rastermill GitHub tarball.

PR surface: Source -1006, Tests -662, Config -4, Other -7. Total -1679 across 16 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR regressions from source: current main has code and tests for `OPENCLAW_IMAGE_BACKEND` and unavailable-optimizer passthrough, while PR head removes the config plumbing, fallback catch, and tests. I did not run a live backend-unavailable scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers require maintainer compatibility and supply-chain decisions plus contributor real-behavior proof, not a narrow autonomous repair.

target.title: Refactor image processing onto Rastermill
target.body:
## Summary

- Delegate OpenClaw image resize/encode/probe mechanics to Rastermill and remove local image parser/codec fallback code.
- Update OpenClaw to the pushed Rastermill SHA with `encodeBest`, remove direct Photon dependencies, and delete the dead media-understanding-core Photon implementation.
- Keep OpenClaw policy in OpenClaw: media caps, managed attachment warnings, SDK compatibility names, and safe alpha handling.

## Verification

- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/media/image-ops.rastermill-adapter.test.ts src/media/web-media.test.ts src/agents/tool-images.test.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/screenshot.test.ts`
- `env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -b tsconfig.projects.json`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint-shards.mjs`
- `env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Image processing mechanics now live in Rastermill instead of OpenClaw-local parser/codec/fallback stacks.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout, Node/OpenClaw repo wrappers, Rastermill commit `53272509b6ccd574e547c8398e1f5d70e878d109` pushed to `openclaw/rastermill`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Vitest media/browser/agent tests, full project typecheck, oxlint shards, changed gate, and Codex autoreview.
Evidence after fix: targeted tests passed 4 files / 62 tests; `check:changed` completed successfully including shrinkwrap guard, typecheck, lint, and import cycles.
Observed result after fix: OpenClaw no longer directly imports Photon for image handling, stale unavailable fallback tests are gone, and Rastermill remains the single image-processing dependency surface.
What was not tested: no live HEIC conversion fixture against installed native tools in this PR run.
target.author: steipete
